# Appwrite Documentation - LLM Guidelines

This is a set of skill files for understanding Appwrite, the open-source backend-as-a-service platform.

## Skill Files

- fundamental.md - General Appwrite concepts, architecture, and setup
- auth.md - Authentication, users, sessions, and teams
- databases.md - Databases, collections, documents, and queries
- functions.md - Serverless functions, runtimes, and deployments
- storage.md - File storage, buckets, and image transformations
- sites.md - Web hosting, deployments, and domains
- messaging.md - Email, SMS, and push notifications
